summary: Adventure chunk from Into the Outdoors with Gun and Camera page 120, chunk 2.

source_text.source_title: Into the Outdoors with Gun and Camera

mechanics.raw_text: Communications are blocked in the tunnel by unspecified environmental factor ‘Wait a few seconds, When the PCs stand up and try todo something, the lights po back. ‘on and the autoshuttle rockets off again, Agility rolls, anyone? And maybe the returning lights interrupt someone in a treasonous act? + Asabove, but the autoshuttle doesn’t restart. Grund-G finally grumbles, then orders a ‘dom PC to open the door. Of course the door won't open, so Grund-G orders him to blow it open. (Still in the dark, unless someone remembered his flashlight, “The PC complies or is executed for insubor- dination. Once the door is blasted open, the party can just squeeze out the door and onto the floor ofthe autoshultle tunnel, Which is covered with the magnetic induction grid, Can you say, "Z22zZzzzzzintttt — Aleeee’t | thought you could. “The safest thing to do i stay in the autoshut- tle until help comes. That’s what Grund-G does, So he stays put and guards the equip- ‘ment. Rank hath its privileges. ‘Grund-G orders the PCs to walk down the tunnel and get help or find an emergency ex- it. They cooperate. Wouldn't you? So turn the power off and on a couple times as the PCs make their way down the tunnel, Fry a couple of Troubleshooters on the induc tion grid. Send the autoshuttle zooming up behind them like a locomotive. Clever PCs will sever the power cables leading to the magnetic grid and autoshutle, Even cleverer PCs will make this damage look like an accident.
